title: Page Configuration Schema
description: Standardized container representing a primary webpage entity.

seo.description: Page-specific meta directives to support search engines.

sections.description: Dynamic layout engine containing pointers or raw section definitions matching layouts.

type.description: The layout block element renderer type.

sectionId.description: Optional custom target HTML id parameter used for anchor scrolls.

isShared.description: Indicates if the section content is pulled from a global reusable content block.

sharedReferenceKey.description: The key associated with shared component instances (e.g., 'primary-contact-form').

content.description: Self-contained page section content data mapping the respective subschematic block.
